description_long: This object features a rectangular planter box with a semi-transparent front panel, revealing a soil bed inside. Rising from the soil is a slender, twisted bonsai trunk with several bare branches, some of which are adorned with a few green leaves. Three large, white lotus-like flowers emerge from the soil, their petals delicately arranged and one petal having fallen onto the planter's edge. The planter itself has a clean, modern appearance with a light, slightly glossy finish and subtle green trim along the top edge. The overall composition combines natural and artificial elements, creating a striking contrast between the organic bonsai and the geometric planter. The object is visually suited for display in urban environments, such as parks, sidewalks, or building entrances.
description: A modern rectangular planter with a twisted bonsai trunk, sparse leaves, and three large white lotus-like flowers, set in a semi-transparent box with a clean, urban aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the semi-transparent planter, two prominent white flowers, and the twisted bonsai trunk with a few leaves.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the planter, the alignment of the three flowers, and the vertical rise of the bonsai trunk.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the planter, the soil bed, and the intricate branching of the bonsai trunk with minimal foliage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the arrangement of the flowers and the trunk's curvature, with a clearer view of the leaves on the left.
attribute_pot_type: Rectangular, modern planter box with semi-transparent glass or acrylic front, light blue-gray color, and subtle green trim along the top edge.
attribute_trunk_curvature: Sharply twisted trunk with multiple bends and turns, resembling the informal upright or slanting bonsai style, with pronounced movement and dynamic form.
attribute_branch_arrangement: Sparse, irregularly spaced branches with some extending outward and others curving upward, creating an open, asymmetrical silhouette.
attribute_leaf_density: Sparse foliage, with only a few clusters of green leaves concentrated on one side of the trunk, giving an overall open and airy appearance.
